title: Ultimate Fun
description: This is my mod with tons of mobs, food, blocks, weapons, tools, and armor.
body:
### This is The Ultimate Fun Mod!  
**This mod is filled with ULTIMATE FUN !!!!!  You can play through in creative or in survival, Its super fun.**

This mod has tons of armor, tools, weapons, ore types, food, drinks, mobs, bosses!


If you have any questions, or anything you would like to be added to the mod you can tell me in the Discord server for all my mods, along with other stuff. Also please report any bugs :) Food is not yet in the gallery, because I don't wanna spoil everything XD. But there are at least 26 food items.

**Discord Server:  https://discord.gg/XBguh3VSXv**


### ⋘  CREDITS ⋙


Made with Mcreator and Blockbench. A lot of help & advice from Beeper,  main bug tester is Ezreechip.



Enjoy! :D
